message:
ci: install binaryen 128 from upstream (apt's is too old for Zig 0.16)

Ubuntu's apt-shipped binaryen can't parse the SIMD opcodes Zig 0.16
emits — `wasm-opt` crashes with "invalid code after SIMD prefix".
Replace `apt install binaryen` with curl-extract of the upstream
prebuilt tarball, pinned to version_128 to match what's on developer
Macs (homebrew binaryen 128).

Applies to docs.yml (was failing the build:browser step) and to
release.yml (would have hit the same issue on the first tag push).
Also adds the missing mise step to release.yml so Zig 0.16 is on
PATH before build:browser runs.

The test.yml + bench.yml workflows aren't affected — they only build
the native .node, never the WASM browser bundle.

files.patch:
@@ -42,8 +42,17 @@ jobs:
         with:
           experimental: true
 
-      - name: Install binaryen (wasm-opt)
-        run: sudo apt-get install -y binaryen
+      - name: Install binaryen (wasm-opt) from upstream release
+        # Ubuntu's apt binaryen is too old to parse the SIMD opcodes
+        # that Zig 0.16 emits. Pin to a recent upstream tarball that
+        # matches the version on developer Macs (homebrew binaryen 128).
+        run: |
+          set -e
+          BINARYEN_VERSION="version_128"
+          curl -fsSL "https://github.com/WebAssembly/binaryen/releases/download/${BINARYEN_VERSION}/binaryen-${BINARYEN_VERSION}-x86_64-linux.tar.gz" | tar -xz -C /tmp
+          sudo cp -r /tmp/binaryen-${BINARYEN_VERSION}/bin/* /usr/local/bin/
+          sudo cp -r /tmp/binaryen-${BINARYEN_VERSION}/lib/* /usr/local/lib/
+          wasm-opt --version
 
       - name: Install workspace deps
         run: npm install --no-audit --no-fund

@@ -120,6 +120,21 @@ jobs:
           node-version: "22"
           registry-url: "https://registry.npmjs.org"
 
+      - uses: jdx/mise-action@v2
+        with:
+          experimental: true
+
+      - name: Install binaryen (wasm-opt) from upstream release
+        # Apt's binaryen is too old to parse the SIMD opcodes Zig 0.16
+        # emits. Pin to match developer Macs (homebrew binaryen 128).
+        run: |
+          set -e
+          BINARYEN_VERSION="version_128"
+          curl -fsSL "https://github.com/WebAssembly/binaryen/releases/download/${BINARYEN_VERSION}/binaryen-${BINARYEN_VERSION}-x86_64-linux.tar.gz" | tar -xz -C /tmp
+          sudo cp -r /tmp/binaryen-${BINARYEN_VERSION}/bin/* /usr/local/bin/
+          sudo cp -r /tmp/binaryen-${BINARYEN_VERSION}/lib/* /usr/local/lib/
+          wasm-opt --version
+
       - name: Download all .node artifacts
         uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
         with:
